<think> The NAB AFL Rising Star award is given to a young player in the Australian Football League. Jaeger O'Meara won the award in 2013. I need to find out which team he plays for. I can look up the teams in the Australian Football League to find out which one he plays for. After researching, I found that Jaeger O'Meara plays for the Gold Coast Suns. Therefore, the team he plays for is the Gold Coast Suns.</think>
<answer> Gold Coast Suns </answer>
